name: Jymie Merritt
abstract: Jymie Merritt (; May 3, 1926 – April 10, 2020) was an American jazz bassist, bandleader, and composer. Merritt was a member of Art Blakey's Jazz Messengers group from 1957 until 1962.

concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: The Blakey Legacy

about_quotes.speaker: Benny Golson
about_quotes.evidence: I said, 'A fellow who used to play with Bullmoose Jackson, and he used to play with B. B. King.' ... 'Jymie Merritt.' ... 'All right. What's his name?' 'Jymie Merritt.'
about_quotes.doc_title: Benny Golson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
